{{Expand}}

{{Infobox event
| name = D’Niss ritual
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|The ritual of the [[D’Niss]] blazes like a supernova.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c39">''The Knight'', chapter 39</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Events]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon events]]
